name: Google Workspace
author: Axon Team
description: OAuth2 sign-in with Google Workspace (Gmail/Calendar/Drive account). Registers an AUTH_PROVIDER using the platform's existing OAuth2 mechanics. Ships with no credentials; requires client_id/client_secret/redirect_uri from a Google Cloud OAuth client.

client_id.description: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from Google Cloud Console

client_secret.description: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret from Google Cloud Console

redirect_uri.description: Registered redirect URI for the OAuth consent screen
